# AfroTools

> Africa's #1 Financial Calculator Platform. Free, country-accurate PAYE, salary, VAT, and mortgage calculators for all 54 African nations.

AfroTools provides financial calculators built with real tax logic from each country's revenue authority. No generic templates — every tool uses actual tax bands, deduction rules, and statutory rates sourced directly from FIRS (Nigeria), KRA (Kenya), GRA (Ghana), SARS (South Africa), and other African revenue authorities.

## Live Tools

- [Nigeria PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-salary-tax): NTA 2025 vs PITA comparison. Includes pension (8%), NHF (2.5%), NHIS, rent relief. FIRS-verified tax bands.
- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye): KRA 5-band PAYE (10%-35%), NSSF Tier I+II (Feb 2025 rates), SHIF 2.75% (replaced NHIF Oct 2024), Affordable Housing Levy 1.5%. Finance Act 2024 compliant.
- [Ghana PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-paye): GRA 2025 tax bands, SSNIT Tier I/II/III, marriage and child relief.
- [Tanzania PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tanzania/tz-paye): TRA tax bands, NSSF (10%), Skills Development Levy (4%).

## Key Facts

- All tools are free, no sign-up required
- Plain HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, fast loading
- Updated when tax laws change (e.g., Kenya's Tax Laws Amendment Act 2024 repealing SHIF relief)
- AI Tax Advisor powered by Claude available on Tier 1 tools
- Covers salary and tax, VAT, mortgage, business ROI, education, and health insurance categories
- Building toward all 54 African countries
